description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Functional Tests that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow consists of multiple jobs (functional-1 to functional-5) that run on ubuntu-18.04, each setting up services for MongoDB, Mosquitto, and an extra Mosquitto instance. In each job, check out the repository and run a functional test using a Docker container with the image fiware/orion-ci:rpm8, varying the test range via environment variables.
